history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, and moving forward advances me toward the open corridor while avoiding the lava to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To my right there is a safe floor cell, while the cells farther right include lava. The goal is visible ahead to the right, so the best next step is to turn right to face the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead-left of my current position, but I cannot move diagonally. The cell directly in front of me is safe floor, while the left side contains lava and the goal beyond it. Moving forward is the safest immediate step and may let me approach the goal from a better angle.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
